context7.name: Context7
context7.description: Library/framework docs lookup. Prevents API hallucination by fetching current documentation for React, Next.js, Django, etc.

playwright.name: Playwright
playwright.description: Browser automation via accessibility tree (not screenshots). Cross-browser testing, scraping JS-heavy pages, visual verification.

figma.name: Figma
figma.description: Bidirectional design-to-code. Read components/variables/layout from Figma, write back to canvas. Code Connect keeps generated code aligned.

sentry.name: Sentry
sentry.description: Error tracking. Pull stack traces, error events, frequency data. Workflow: paste issue ID -> agent reads trace -> writes fix -> opens PR.

supabase.name: Supabase
supabase.description: Database schema exploration, SQL execution, TypeScript type generation, database branching. Official Claude connector.

cloudflare.name: Cloudflare (Code Mode)
cloudflare.description: 2,500+ Cloudflare endpoints with 99.9% token reduction via Code Mode. Workers, KV, D1, R2 management.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Stripe API documentation search + payment integration helpers. OAuth + restricted keys for security.

linear.name: Linear
linear.description: Issue tracking integration. Manage issues, sprints, projects from within the agent. Saves context-switching.

grep-app.name: grep.app
grep-app.description: Global public code search across all GitHub repos. Find implementation examples, usage patterns, real-world references. Originally omo default remote.

ast-grep.name: ast-grep
ast-grep.description: AST-level structural code search/replace. Metavariable patterns ($NAME, $$$ARGS). Language-aware — matches code structure, not text. Originally omo built-in.

lsp-tools.name: LSP Tools
lsp-tools.description: Language server protocol tools — diagnostics, symbols, hover, find references. Code intelligence without an IDE. Originally omo built-in.

tavily.name: Tavily Web Search
tavily.description: AI-optimized web search. Deeper than built-in WebSearch — returns structured extracts, not just links. Originally omo default remote.
tavily.origin: omo built-in (falls back to Exa if no Tavily key)

exa.name: Exa Search
exa.description: AI-native semantic search. Find similar pages, get page contents, neural search across the web. Exa is omo's fallback when Tavily key is absent.

_omx_reference._note: omx (oh-my-codex) has 6 built-in MCP servers that require omx runtime — NOT standalone installable.
_omx_reference.omx_code_intel: Code Intelligence: 9 tools wrapping tsc diagnostics + ast-grep search/replace + grep references. 'code-intel' = code intelligence, not Intel CPU.

_note: Curated MCP servers. Servers with 'origin' field were originally harness built-ins. omx servers require omx runtime and cannot be installed standalone.
